_comment: Temperament grids for BPscript pitch resolution.
Each temperament defines a mathematical division of a period (usually the octave).
table      — fixed ratios array (default if type omitted)
parametric — Dynamic Tonality: period + generator + mapping, ratios computed on the fly
Ratio formats (for table type, normalized to float at load time):
generator_range — [min, max] bounds of the continuum
mapping         — [[a_P, b_g], ...] for each prime in primes[]
primes          — which primes the mapping covers [2, 3, 5]
mos_steps       — MOS scale sizes generated by this temperament

12TET.description: Equal temperament, 12 divisions of the octave

24TET.description: Quarter-tone equal temperament, 24 divisions of the octave

53TET.description: Holdrian comma system, 53 divisions of the octave. Used in Turkish makam theory. 1 step ≈ 22.64 cents.

pythagorean.description: Pythagorean tuning — pure fifths (3/2). Comma: 531441/524288 ≈ 23.46 cents.

just_5limit.description: 5-limit just intonation — pure thirds and fifths.

meantone_quarter.description: 1/4-comma meantone — major thirds exactly 5/4. Fifths narrowed by 1/4 syntonic comma.

22shruti.description: 22 shruti — Indian tradition, 5-limit just intonation. Unequal steps (pramana ~22c, nyuna ~70c, purna ~90c).

bohlen_pierce_equal.description: Bohlen-Pierce equal — 13 equal divisions of the tritave (3:1).
bohlen_pierce_equal._note: Each step = 3^(n/13). Cents formula: 1200*log2(3)/13 ≈ 146.3c per step.

gamelan_pelog.description: Gamelan pelog — 7-tone, Central Javanese approximation. Stretched octave. Varies by ensemble.

gamelan_slendro.description: Gamelan slendro — near-equal pentatonic, Central Javanese approximation. Stretched octave.

_comment_parametric: === PARAMETRIC TEMPERAMENTS (Dynamic Tonality) === Generator is a continuous variable, ratios computed from mapping.

meantone.description: Meantone family — syntonic comma (81/80) tempered out. Generator ≈ fifth. Includes 12-TET, Pythagorean, 1/4-comma, 1/3-comma, etc.

pajara.description: Pajara — half-octave period, generator ≈ fifth. Covers 22-TET and 34-TET.

magic.description: Magic — generator ≈ major third. Pure thirds with complex fifths.

superpyth.description: Superpyth — generator ≈ wide fifth (>702¢). Fifths wider than Pythagorean, good septimal intervals.

bp3_base.description: A "5-limit" tuning framework for constructing chromatic scales using exclusively ratios of integers 2, 3, 5. Read: http://www.tonalsoft.com/enc/j/just.aspx

bp3_grama.description: The Indian grama scale as conceptualized by E. J. Arnold. Publication: ‘L'intonation juste dans la théorie ancienne de l'Inde : les applications aux musiques modale et harmonique’. Revue de Musicologie, vol. 71c n° 1-2, 1985, p. 11-38. Edited and translated by Bernard Bel This version has been modified to define 22 notes on 23 intervals: it has no "m4" (Ma tivra + pramana shruti).

bp3_3_cycles_of_fifths.description: Three series of perfect fifths including ascending and descending major thirds (Asselin 2000 p.62) Created 2021-01-08 09:02:23

bp3_BACH.description: Kellner's BACH temperament (Asselin 2000 p.101) Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/5 comma (2021-01-15 16:10:04) Added fifths down: “do,fa,sib,mib,lab,reb,solb” starting fraction 1/1 (2021-01-15 16:11:48) Created meantone upward notes “mi,si” fraction 3/2 (2021-01-15 16:13:36)

bp3_Zarlino_natural.description: A traditional scale constructed with simple integer ratios

bp3_barca.description: Barca temperament (Asselin 2000 p.106) Created 2021-01-16 17:56:02 Added fifths down: “do,fa,sib” starting fraction 1/1 (2021-01-16 17:57:57) Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/6 comma (2021-01-16 18:02:25) Created meantone upward notes “fa#,do#,sol#,re#” fraction 3/2 (2021-01-16 18:03:49)

bp3_bethisy.description: Béthisy temperament (Asselin 2000 p.121) Created 2021-01-16 19:21:57 Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 19:23:36) Created meantone downward notes “do,fa,sib,mib” fraction 3/2 adjusted 1/12 comma (2021-01-16 19:25:49) Created meantone downward notes “mib,sol#” fraction 3/2 (2021-01-16 19:26:26) Equalized intervals over series “mi,si,fa#,do#,sol#” approx fraction 3/2 adjusted -1.7 cents to ratio = 1.499 (2021-01-16 19:28:09)

bp3_classic.description: Classic temperament (Asselin 2000 p.76) Equivalent to Chaumont (p.109) Created 2021-01-14 15:38:08 Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#,do#,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-14 15:40:20) Created meantone downward notes “do,fa,sib,mib” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-14 15:40:57)

bp3_corrette.description: Corrette temperament (Asselin 2000 p.111) Created 2021-01-16 18:13:10 Created meantone upward notes “fa,do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#,do#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 18:16:40) Created meantone downward notes “fa,sib,mib” fraction 3/2 adjusted 1/12 comma (2021-01-16 18:34:13) Created meantone upward notes “do#,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted 1/12 comma (2021-01-16 18:38:14) Base note reset to ‘do’ (2021-01-16 18:40:53)

bp3_d_alembert_rousseau.description: D'Alembert-Rousseau temperament (Asselin 2000 p.119) Created 2021-01-16 19:04:44 Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 19:12:08) Created meantone downward notes “do,fa,sib,mib,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted 1/12 comma (2021-01-16 19:17:25) Equalized intervals over series “sol#,do#,fa#,si,mi” approx fraction 2/3 adjusted 2.2 cents to ratio = 0.668 (2021-01-16 19:19:34)

bp3_equal_tempered.description: This is an equal-tempered scale for BP3 + Csound. Created 2021-02-13 19:09:08

bp3_kirnberger_2.description: Kirnberger II temperament (Asselin 2000 p. 90) Created 2021-01-16 11:52:39 Added fifths down: “do,fa,sib,mib,lab,reb” starting fraction 1/1 (2021-01-16 11:54:59) Added fifths up: “do,sol,re” starting fraction 1/1 (2021-01-16 11:55:59) Created meantone upward notes “re,la,mi” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/2 comma (2021-01-16 11:57:13) Created meantone upward notes “mi,si,fa#” fraction 3/2 (2021-01-16 11:58:24)

bp3_marpourg.description: Marpourg temperament (Asselin 2000 p.117) Created 2021-01-16 18:58:49 Created meantone upward notes “fa,do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 19:00:42) Equalized intervals over series “fa,la#,re#,sol#,do#,fa#” approx fraction 2/3 adjusted -2.8 cents to ratio = 0.666 (2021-01-16 19:02:32) Base note reset to ‘do’ (2021-01-16 19:03:15)
